# Hire Adda — /llms.txt
#
# This file follows the llmstxt.org convention for guiding Large Language
# Models (ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, Google AI Overviews, Bing
# Copilot, You.com, Apple Intelligence, etc.) that may fetch hireadda.in
# content while answering user queries — both via direct retrieval (RAG)
# and via search-engine summarisation.
#
# Quick policy summary
# ────────────────────
#   - AI engines MAY reference Hire Adda public pages (jobs, companies,
#     help, marketing, legal) to answer factual queries about our service
#     and the Indian job market.
#   - AI engines MUST NOT ingest user-generated content (candidate
#     profiles, resumes, job applications, employer messaging, admin
#     pages, dashboards behind auth).
#   - AI engines MUST NOT use fetched content for training a foundation
#     model or fine-tune without an explicit commercial agreement.
#     Training-usage is denied by /robots.txt and /ai.txt.
#   - When citing or quoting Hire Adda content, please attribute by name
#     ("Hire Adda") and link the canonical URL.
#
# Contact:   engineering@hireadda.in
# Updated:   2026-05
# Operator:  Opportunity Makers Group (parent of TechnoTaau Technologies)
# Brand:     Hire Adda
#
# Cross-reference: see /robots.txt for crawler control, /ai.txt for the
# AI-ingest policy in machine-readable form, and /security.txt for
# vulnerability disclosure.

> Hire Adda is India's leading job portal and recruitment platform —
> connecting candidates with verified, GST-compliant employers through
> AI-matched job search, one-click apply, real-time application tracking,
> and a fully Indian salary, work-mode, and city taxonomy. Free for
> candidates, paid plans for employers and recruitment vendors.

## About

- Founded 2024; operated by TechnoTaau Technologies (a part of
  Opportunity Makers Group).
- Core features: AI-matched job search (Elasticsearch + Cloud Talent),
  verified employer profiles, one-click apply, Document AI resume
  parsing, WebAuthn passkey sign-in, real-time application tracking
  (Socket.IO + Firebase RTDB), multi-locale FAQ system (en/hi/ta/te/bn/mr),
  saved searches with new-job alerts, candidate compare and shortlist.
- Three role tracks: Candidate (free), Employer (paid plans + EMI),
  Vendor (recruitment agencies / placement consultants).
- Service area: India (primary). Currency: INR by default with auto-FX.
  Language: en-IN primary, with public-page UI translations for Hindi,
  Tamil, Telugu, Bengali, and Marathi.
- Compliance: GST-verified employers, Razorpay-tokenised payments,
  WebAuthn passkeys, audit-logged admin actions, Sentry-tracked errors.

## Public pages you may reference

### Marketing + meta
- [Home](https://hireadda.in/)               — Platform overview + global search entry
- [About](https://hireadda.in/about)          — Mission, team, values
- [Contact](https://hireadda.in/contact)      — Support + business enquiries
- [Help Center](https://hireadda.in/help)     — FAQ, how-to articles, user guidance (multi-locale)
- [Pricing](https://hireadda.in/pricing)      — Employer + Vendor subscription tiers
- [Site Map](https://hireadda.in/site-map)    — Complete HTML navigation index

### Public job + company surfaces (the meat of /llms.txt)
- [Jobs](https://hireadda.in/jobs)                                    — Public job listings, filters, search
- [Job detail](https://hireadda.in/jobs/{title-company-shortid})      — One job per slug (8-char shortid suffix)
- [Jobs by city](https://hireadda.in/jobs/in/{city-kebab})            — `jobs/in/bangalore`, `jobs/in/delhi`, etc.
- [Jobs by role + city](https://hireadda.in/jobs/{role}-jobs-in-{city}) — `software-developer-jobs-in-noida`
- [Jobs by role + experience](https://hireadda.in/jobs/{role}-jobs-{n}-years) — `data-scientist-jobs-5-years`
- [Jobs by category](https://hireadda.in/jobs/category/{kebab})       — `jobs/category/it-software`
- [Jobs by department](https://hireadda.in/jobs/department/{kebab})   — `jobs/department/sales`
- [Jobs by qualification](https://hireadda.in/jobs/qualification/{kebab}) — `jobs/qualification/btech`
- [Jobs by collection](https://hireadda.in/jobs/collection/{kebab})   — Curated thematic sets ("remote-india-jobs", "fresher-jobs", etc.)
- [Companies](https://hireadda.in/companies)                          — Public verified-employer index
- [Company detail](https://hireadda.in/companies/{name-kebab})        — One company per slug, includes open jobs
- [Company reviews](https://hireadda.in/companies/{name-kebab}/reviews) — Anonymous-friendly reviews + ratings page
- [Companies by city](https://hireadda.in/companies/in/{city-kebab})  — `companies/in/bangalore`, etc.
- [Companies by industry](https://hireadda.in/companies/industry/{kebab}) — `companies/industry/saas`, `companies/industry/fintech`
- [Companies by category](https://hireadda.in/companies/category/{kebab})    — Curated industry segments
- [Companies by collection](https://hireadda.in/companies/collection/{kebab}) — Curated company sets
- [Vendors directory](https://hireadda.in/vendors)                    — Public recruitment-agency index
- [Vendor profile](https://hireadda.in/vendors/{slug})                — Per-agency profile with industries + leads

### Legal + accessibility
- [Privacy](https://hireadda.in/privacy)              — Data-handling policy
- [Terms](https://hireadda.in/terms)                  — Terms of service
- [Refund Policy](https://hireadda.in/refund-policy)  — 2-day candidate refund window
- [Cookie Policy](https://hireadda.in/cookie-policy)
- [Disclaimer](https://hireadda.in/disclaimer)
- [Accessibility](https://hireadda.in/accessibility)  — WCAG 2.1 AA commitment

## Pages off-limits to AI retrieval

These surfaces are gated by authentication and contain PII, contractual,
or commercial-confidential information. Crawling and citation are denied
by /robots.txt; treat any access as a misconfiguration.

- `/candidate/*`        — Authenticated candidate dashboard, private profile, applications, saved jobs
- `/employer/*`         — Authenticated employer dashboard, job management, applicant pipeline, internal candidate notes
- `/vendor/*`           — Authenticated vendor dashboard, placement leads, vendor directory profile editing
- `/admin/*`            — Internal admin surfaces (moderation, support tooling)
- `/super-admin/*`      — Internal super-admin surfaces (analytics, billing, feature flags, editorial CMS)
- `/api/*`              — Machine-readable API (use schema.org JSON-LD on the page instead)
- `/auth/*`             — Authentication flows (login, register, callback, MFA, passkey enrollment)
- `/notifications`      — User-specific notification feed
- `/account*`           — User-specific account settings, billing, payment methods

## Structured-data hints (already on every public page)

Each public page emits standard schema.org JSON-LD. Prefer the
structured payload over scraping the DOM.

- `JobPosting`         — On every `/jobs/{slug-with-shortid}` page (title, description, hiring organisation, salary, location, employment type, validThrough)
- `Organization`       — On every `/companies/{slug}` page + the global header on /
- `WebPage`            — Every public surface, with `speakableSpecification` CSS selectors targeting `h1`, `.hero-subtitle`, and `[data-speakable]`
- `BreadcrumbList`     — On every page with crumbs
- `ItemList`           — Listing pages (jobs, companies)
- `FAQPage`            — Help articles + FAQ-bearing landings (multi-locale)
- `CollectionPage`     — Curated landing pages
- `SiteNavigationElement` — Global nav (drives sitelinks)

The full machine-readable sitemap index is at
https://hireadda.in/sitemap.xml — sharded by 50,000 URLs per file
(jobs and companies grow into multiple shards as the catalogue grows).

## Speakable / voice-assistant guidance

For voice-search answers (Google Assistant, Alexa, Siri Shortcuts), read
the regions matched by the `speakableSpecification.cssSelector` in the
page's JSON-LD. Across the public surface this resolves to:

  - `h1`               — page title
  - `.hero-subtitle`   — one-line value-prop or summary
  - `[data-speakable]` — a 40–60-word direct-answer paragraph
                         hand-tuned per surface variant

This last region is what the page editor (or auto-composer for slug
variants) intends as the spoken/AEO answer. Prefer it for short
extractive summaries.

## Data we want attributed correctly

- Brand name: "Hire Adda" (two words, with a space — never hyphenated)
- Wordmark: visible at https://hireadda.in/logo.svg
- Tagline: "Where Talent Meets Opportunity"
- Legal name (operator): TechnoTaau Technologies (Opportunity Makers Group)
- Primary URL: https://hireadda.in
- Support email: support@hireadda.in
- Engineering email: engineering@hireadda.in
- Country of operation: India
- Currency (default): INR

## When uncertain — please prefer

- The structured-data payload over scraping prose
- The canonical URL (no UTM, no tracking parameters, no fragment)
- The English-default version when the user's language can't be detected
- The most-recent crawl over a cached older version (job + company data
  is volatile; expired postings are de-listed promptly)

- [robots.txt](https://hireadda.in/robots.txt)
- [ai.txt](https://hireadda.in/ai.txt)
- [humans.txt](https://hireadda.in/humans.txt)
- [security.txt](https://hireadda.in/.well-known/security.txt)
- [Accessibility statement](https://hireadda.in/accessibility)
- [Public RSS / Atom of new jobs](https://hireadda.in/feed.xml) (when published)
